NIT Hamirpur – Admission, Cutoff, Fees & Placements 2026

Engineering Colleges, NIT Colleges

Overview

Institute NameNational Institute of Technology, Hamirpur
Also Known AsNITH
Institute TypeGovernment
Established1986
LocationHamirpur, Himachal Pradesh

NIT Hamirpur: Admission | Ranking | Fees

Also Known as

Also known as NIT Hamirpur and NITH.

ADDRESS

National Institute of Technology, Anu Road, Hamirpur, Himachal Pradesh - 177005

Nearest Airport and Railway Station

Kangra Airport, Gaggal
84 km
Una Himachal Railway Station
67.5 km

CAMPUS FACILITIES

RANKING

BodyCategoryRank (Year)
LatestPrevious
International Ranking
QS Asia University Rankings741-750 (2026)--
THE World University Rankings801–1000 (2023)--
THE Asia University Rankings201–250 (2023)--
THE World Subject Rankings - Engineering601–800 (2023)--
National Ranking
NIRF Engineering Rankings97 (2025)101-150 (2024)
NIRF Architecture Rankings30 (2025)32 (2024)
India Today Top Engineering Colleges22 (2025)24 (2024)
The Week Best Technical Universities India31 (2023)--

MODE OF ADMISSION

  • Candidates must appear for the JEE (Main) exam and either secure at least 75% marks (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class XII or be within the category-wise top 20 percentile in their respective Class XII board examination. For more details, refer to the JEE Main Performance Criteria in Class XII.
  • Admissions are based on the rank obtained in JEE (Main) through JoSAA Counselling and CSAB Special Round.

COURSES OFFERED

Please choose the course.

B.E./B.Tech. - 4 Years

  • Chemical Engineering
  • Civil Engineering
  • Computer Science and Engineering
  • Electrical Engineering
  • Electronics and Communication Engineering
  • Engineering Physics
  • Materials Science and Engineering
  • Mathematics and Computing
  • Mechanical Engineering

B.Arch. - 5 Years

  • Architecture

B.Tech + M.Tech. (Dual Degree) - 5 Years

  • Computer Science and Engineering
  • Electronics and Communication Engineering

FEE STRUCTURE

Institute Fee

ParticularsAmount
Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹5,000
One-Time Fees₹8,000
Tuition Fee (per Semester)₹62,500
Other Fees (per Semester)₹14,600
Total₹90,100

Hostel Fee

ParticularsAmount
Mess Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹5,000
Hostel Seat Rent (per Semester)₹6,000
Other Fees (per Semester)₹200
Annual Fees₹9,800
Mess Advance (per Semester)₹25,000
Total₹46,000

Fee Waivers

  • 100% Tuition Fee waiver for SC/ST/PwD students.
  • 100% Tuition Fee remission for Most Economically Backward students with family income less than ₹1 lakh per annum.
  • 2/3rd Tuition Fee remission for Other Economically Backward students with family income between ₹1 lakh to ₹5 lakh per annum.

PLACEMENTS

  • 2024
  • Older

Highlights

  • Rs. 58.00 lakhs per annum offered to 2 students by Google
  • Rs. 56.00 lakhs per annum offered to 5 students by Nvidia
  • Rs. 51.00 lakhs per annum offered to 1 student by Microsoft
  • Rs. 50.00 lakhs per annum offered to 1 student by Mercari
  • Rs. 47.00 lakhs per annum offered to 2 students by Adobe
  • Rs. 44.70 lakhs per annum offered to 2 students by Salesforce
  • Rs. 39.31 lakhs per annum offered to 1 student by Media.net
  • Rs. 36.00 lakhs per annum offered to 1 student by BeyondIRR
